data.title: Oiltek International Gains Approval for SGX Mainboard Transfer
data.description:
Koh Brothers Eco Engineering Limited ( (SG:5HV) ) has provided an announcement.

Oiltek International Limited, a company incorporated in Singapore, has announced that it has received approval in-principle from the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited (SGX-ST) for its proposed transfer from the Catalist Board to the Mainboard. This approval is contingent on meeting specific SGX-ST listing requirements and obtaining shareholders’ approval. The move to the Mainboard is expected to enhance the company’s visibility and potentially improve its market positioning, benefiting stakeholders by aligning with the more stringent standards and broader exposure associated with the Mainboard.

More about Koh Brothers Eco Engineering Limited

data.title: Silver Elephant Mining Seeks Reinstatement of Bolivian Contract Amid Disputes
data.description:
Silver Elephant Mining ( (TSE:ELEF) ) has shared an announcement.

Silver Elephant Mining Corp., a mining company, is actively working to reinstate its Mining Production Contract (MPC) with the Corporacion Minera de Bolivia (Comibol) after it was unilaterally canceled by Comibol in December 2024 due to alleged illegal mining activities. The company maintains that it has not conducted any illegal activities and is seeking to resolve the issue through meetings with Comibol and legal avenues. Additionally, Silver Elephant is in a dispute with Andean Precious Metals Corp. over a purchase and sales agreement involving oxide materials from the MPC area, with Silver Elephant accusing Andean of contractual interference and demanding cessation of such activities.

More about Silver Elephant Mining

YTD Price Performance: 10.53%

Average Trading Volume: 90,737

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$8.29M

data.title: ACS Announces Annual General Meeting with Key Financial Decisions
data.description:
Actividades de Construccion y Servicios SA ( (ES:ACS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ACS has announced its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders to be held in Madrid, with options for telematic participation and early voting. data.title: POET Technologies Partners with Lessengers for 800G DR8 Transceiver Development
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from POET Technologies ( (TSE:PTK) ).

On April 2, 2025, POET Technologies announced a partnership with South Korea’s Lessengers to develop an 800G DR8 transceiver for AI and hyperscale data center markets. This collaboration combines POET’s optical engines with Lessengers’ Direct Optical Wiring technology, aiming to provide a cost-effective and efficient solution. The partnership is expected to enhance POET’s industry positioning by expanding its market reach and offering innovative optical solutions, potentially benefiting stakeholders by improving product offerings and operational capabilities.

More about POET Technologies

POET Technologies Inc. is a design and development company specializing in high-speed optical modules, optical engines, and light source products for artificial intelligence systems and hyperscale data centers. Their photonic integration solutions are based on the patented POET Optical Interposer platform, which integrates electronic and photonic devices into a single chip. POET’s products are known for being cost-effective, power-efficient, compact, and scalable, addressing challenges in AI systems, 5G networks, and autonomous vehicle sensing applications. The company is headquartered in Toronto, Canada, with operations in the United States, China, and Singapore.

YTD Price Performance: -40.52%

Average Trading Volume: 1,614,699

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $297.4M

data.title: Frontier IP CFO Executes Share Transaction to Maintain Holdings
data.description:
Frontier IP ( (GB:FIPP) ) has issued an announcement.

Frontier IP Group plc announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Jo Stent, executed a share transaction involving the sale and immediate repurchase of 53,571 ordinary shares. The transaction, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, was carried out to maintain her beneficial interest in the company unchanged. This move is part of the company’s compliance with the EU Market Abuse Regulation, reflecting transparency in managerial transactions, which may reassure stakeholders about the company’s governance practices.

More about Frontier IP

Frontier IP Group plc specializes in commercializing intellectual property by identifying promising intellectual property and accelerating its development through various commercialization services. The company actively involves relevant industry partners early in the development process to ensure that the technology meets real-world demands. Frontier IP aims to build and grow a portfolio of equity stakes and license income by supporting spin-out companies, including fundraising and collaboration with industry partners.

data.title: STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC Purchases Own Shares
data.description:
STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC ( (GB:STS) ) has issued an update.

STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC announced the purchase of 100,000 of its own ordinary shares at an average price of 240.25 pence per share, which will be held in treasury. This transaction affects the company’s share capital, with a total of 120,936,415 issued ordinary shares excluding treasury shares. This move is part of the company’s strategy to manage its share capital and potentially enhance shareholder value.

data.title: GoGold Resources Files Final Prospectus for $75 Million Offering
data.description:
The latest update is out from GoGold Resources ( (TSE:GGD) ).

GoGold Resources has filed a final short form prospectus for its $75,002,200 bought deal public offering of common shares, priced at $1.82 per share, with the potential to raise an additional $11,250,330 if the over-allotment option is fully exercised. The offering, expected to close on April 4, 2025, has received conditional approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange, and aims to bolster the company’s financial position and market presence, although the shares will not be available in the United States.

More about GoGold Resources

GoGold Resources is a Canadian-based company specializing in silver and gold production, with a focus on operating, developing, exploring, and acquiring high-quality projects in Mexico. The company operates the Parral Tailings mine in Chihuahua and is involved in the Los Ricos South and North exploration and development projects in Jalisco. Headquartered in Halifax, Nova Scotia, GoGold aims to build a portfolio of low-cost, high-margin projects.

data.title: Protector Forsikring ASA Transfers Danish WC Portfolio to DARAG
data.description:
Protector Forsikring ASA ( (PSKRF) ) has provided an update.

Protector Forsikring ASA has entered into an agreement with DARAG Deutschland to transfer its entire workers’ compensation portfolio in Denmark, pending regulatory approvals. This transaction will eliminate Protector’s exposure to the Danish WC market, with limited impact on its solvency margin and result, and is expected to be completed by Q3 2025.
